MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Parish Entertainment Group, a business organization, form unknown, Jason Perkins, an individual, and Michael O'Connor, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Nitoj P. Singh, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ticketfly, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
No appearance by defendants Parish Entertainment Group, a business organization, form unknown, Jason Perkins, an individual, or Michael O'Connor, an individual.
Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint for Breach of Contract, Intentional Interference with Contractual Relations and Unfair Business Practices was filed March 21, 2016.
Defendant CrowdTorch LLC's answer to plaintiff's First Amended Complaint was filed on April 20, 2016.
Defendants Parish Entertainment Group, a business organization, form unknown, Jason Perkins, an individual, and Michael O'Connor's, an individual, answer to plaintiff's First Amended Complaint was filed on July 19, 2018.
Dismissal with prejudice as to defendant CrowdTorch LLC was filed on December 21, 2018.
Order Striking defendants Parish Entertainment Group, a business organization, form unknown, Jason Perkins, an individual, and Michael O'Connor's, an individual, answer to plaintiff's First Amended Complaint, and Entering Default as to those three defendants, was filed on February 28, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 12, 2019.
Defaults were entered on December 20, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Ticketfly, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendants Parish Entertainment Group, a business organization, form unknown, Jason Perkins, an individual, and Michael O'Connor, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $97,706.57.
Prejudgment Interest - $57,020.10.
Attorney Fees - $43,413.00.
Costs - 540.00.

Total - $198,679.67.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
